_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: mosfet80
data.message:
rolling use c++17
remove unused travis file

data.author: talregev
data.message:
start to extend the cv_bridge with cvCompressedImage class, that will convert from cv::Mat opencv images to CompressedImage ros messages and vice versa

Finish to write CvCompressedImage extention of cv_bridge.
Need to write a small example to see that it working, and how to use it (it will be very similar to CvImage class uses).

going to version 1.11.9
- fix case at CompressedImage empty string at source. convert it to BGR8. (default).

add simple example nodelet.

compleate the cv_bridge extension:
- Add CvCompressedImage class that convert from CompressedImage msg to opencv image and vice versa.
- Add two examples from [wiki](http://wiki.ros.org/cv_bridge/Tutorials/UsingCvBridgeToConvertBetweenROSImagesAndOpenCVImages):
  That can show how CvImage and CvCompressedImage can be used.

roll back to version 1.11.8
roll back CvImage constractor.

change API:
- prevent code duplicate code
- API is more simpler and more logic that way.

remove docs and comments.

remove tabs.

Add ducuments for dst_format.
Fix default value for sensor_msgs::CompressedImagePtr toCompressedImageMsg(const std::string& dst_format = std::string()) const;

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Remove the last remnants of boost from image_geometry.

All of its functionality can be had from std:: in C++11, so
use that instead.  This also requires us to add the -std=c++11
flag.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@osrfoundation.org>

data.author: mintar
data.message:
Add equidistant distortion model (#358)

The equidistant distortion model is based on the following publication:

J. Kannala and S. Brandt (2006). A Generic Camera Model and Calibration Method for Conventional, Wide-Angle, and Fish-Eye Lenses, IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, vol. 28, no. 8, pp. 1335-1340

In OpenCV, this model is called the "fisheye" distortion model.

Export sensor_msgs dependency (#392)

data.author: carlosmccosta
data.message:
Added sensor_msgs::Image conversion to cv::Mat from rqt_image_view in
order to be able to create videos from kinect color and depth images
(cv_bridge
currently doesn't support 16UC1 image encoding).

Code adapted from:
https://github.com/ros-visualization/rqt_common_plugins/blob/groovy-devel/rqt_image_view/src/rqt_image_view/image_view.cpp

data.author: xqms
data.message:
pinhole_camera_model: fix implicit shared_ptr cast to bool for C++11

In C++11 boost::shared_ptr does not provide the implicit bool conversion
operator anymore, so make the cast in pinhole_camera_model.h explicit.
That does not hurt in older C++ standards and makes compilation with C++11
possible.

data.author: Tobias Bär
data.message:
Added operator= for the PinholeCameraModel.

Added the operator= for the PinholeCameraModel. I am not sure if the
PinholeCameraModel needs to have a destructor, too. To follow the
'rule of three' it should actually have one.

data.author: arhachey
data.message:
Add dependency on generated messages

Catkin requires explicit enumeration of dependencies on generated messages.
Add this declaration to properly flatten the dependency graph and force Catkin
to generate geometry_msgs before compiling image_geometry.
